evals.prompt: We are a B2B SaaS company evaluating two AI support vendors. Create a vendor scorecard and call out the hidden risks.
evals.expected_output: A vendor scorecard that evaluates product fit, retrieval, escalation, read/write action safety, analytics, security, partnership risk, wizard-of-oz risk, and tollbooth risk.

evals.prompt: Help me plan a shadow run before launching an AI support system to customers.
evals.expected_output: A shadow run scorecard with case types, pass/fail criteria, stop conditions, and launch readiness recommendation.

evals.prompt: We launched our AI support machine last month. Build a first 30 days review doc. We have some metrics missing.
evals.expected_output: A first-30-days review that does not invent missing metrics, clearly marks placeholders, and focuses on resolution, trust, escalation quality, knowledge fixes, and human work shift.

evals.prompt: We cut over to AI support 48 hours ago. Customers are going silent after answers, a few bots are looping with us, and some employees are forwarding internal emails into the queue. Build the review.
evals.expected_output: A first-48-hours evidence review that treats silence as a signal to classify, captures bot-loop and inside-job edge cases, separates blockers from v0.2 fixes, and avoids declaring success from dashboard movement alone.
